pageContext.name: Batgirl Deluxe
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios present the latest from the Art Scale 1:10 line - Batgirl Deluxe! Based on the likeness of Barbara Gordon from DC Comics Series #7, this polystone statue is hand-painted and limited edition.   DC Comics fans, don't miss your chance to add this Batgirl collectible to your DC collection!
